Uses of Class
com.nib.supernaut.security.User

Packages that use User
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.security
Security and authentication services for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal
General terminal control and emulation handling for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.printer
virtual printer terminal services

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    User
    SupernautRegion.assignUser(String userid)
    Assigns a user based on the provided user ID.
    User

    Authenticates a user using the provided credentials and/or existing authentication.
    User
    SupernautRegion.changePassword(String user, String password, String newPassword)
    Changes the password for the specified user.
    User
    SupernautContext.getCurrentUser()
    Retrieves the current user associated with the task.
    User

    Description
    void
